title: Yellow Paper Flying Insect Catchers, 5 x 2 x 2 cm (8 Pack) - Poison-Free Traps, Safe, & Easy to Use for Indoor & Outdoor Spaces
features: EFFECTIVE PEST CONTROL: Our yellow flying insect catchers are designed to effectively trap and eliminate flying pests, providing you with peace of mind and a bug-free living space. Each pack includes 8 traps, each measuring 5 x 2 x 2 cm.

DURABLE & LONG-LASTING: Made from high-quality paper designed to stand up against weather and temperature changes when used outside. Each trap is equipped with a strong adhesive to ensure efficient and long-lasting bug control.

SAFE & EASY TO USE: No chemicals or poisons, making them safe to use in homes with children and pets. Simply peel off the protective paper and place the trap in desired areas where flying insects are present, such as near windows or doors.

VERSATILE PROTECTION: With the flexibility to be used both indoors and outdoors, these traps are ideal for safeguarding every corner of your property; from the kitchen and living rooms to gardens and patios.
SUITABLE FOR ALL SEASONS: Whether it's spring, summer, fall, or winter, our yellow flying insect catchers are effective year-round for keeping pesky flying insects away.
description: Our Flying Insect Catcher is the ideal and green way to get rid of pesky flying insects.
